summary: Frontend-only verification of SMERA RLM Fase 1 process detail. Primary bug (signed-document upload) is FIXED and verified end-to-end: file uploads succeed, filename link and green stamp render, no error toast, and backend PUT persists signedDocFile.path (Emergent object storage path returned). All secondary features requested also work: external link field, bank dropdown, participant editor, multiple ISRC/GRID rows, correction mode with save/cancel, 8-step stepper without horizontal scroll, larger project title, no red top line, zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: onUploadSigned in /app/frontend/src/pages/RLMProcessoDetail.jsx correctly relies on the browser/axios to set the multipart Content-Type with boundary (no manual header) — this is the fix and it works. Backend GET returned signedDocFile = { name, path=smera/rlm/<procId>/<uuid>.pdf, contentType=application/pdf, size } confirming persistence to object storage.

Stepper renders exactly 8 steps and fits within the 1920px viewport (scrollWidth == clientWidth), each step is a clickable button (step-<key>) and read-only StageSummary is shown for non-current steps with Corrigir/Ir-para-atual actions.
Correction mode gates all editable inputs behind `showStage`, exposes save-correction-btn + cancel-correction-btn, calls POST /rlm-processes/{id}/log-correction, then reloads (verified from source).
ISRC/GRID list: add-isrc-btn increments rows (0→1→2 verified), fields field-isrc-<n>/field-grid-<n> and del-isrc-<n> present per row.
Participantes editor is rendered inside correction mode with add-participante-btn and BankSelect (field-esc-banco / participante-banco-<n>) — data-testids match request.
Project title uses heading-lg (36px measured); no red top border/line detected on the body first child.
MINOR (not blocking, carry-over from iter_2): header still shows the legacy admin name for the new admin — cosmetic only.

success_rate.backend: not re-run this iteration (frontend-only request); iter_2 = 38/38 pytest passing
success_rate.frontend: 100% on requested scenarios (upload bug fix, external link, bank dropdown, participant editor + add btn, ISRC add/remove, correction mode save/cancel, stepper 8 steps + read-only view, title/visual)

seed_data_creation: None. Used the pre-existing process 11f60664-449c-4d7e-b899-a903c983fd8f already at 'aguardando_vendor_ops'. Uploaded a tiny synthetic PDF (/tmp/upload/test-signed.pdf, 47 bytes).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Signed-doc upload flow lives at RLMProcessoDetail.jsx onUploadSigned; upload endpoint POST /api/rlm-processes/{id}/upload-signed returns { name, path, contentType, size } stored under smera/rlm/<procId>/<uuid>.<ext>. Persistence verified via GET /api/rlm-processes/{id} → signedDocFile.path is set. Testids used: upload-signed-input, upload-signed-label, signed-file-link, signed-stamp, remove-signed-btn, field-signed-link, field-esc-banco, participante-banco-0, add-participante-btn, add-isrc-btn, del-isrc-0, field-isrc-0/1, field-grid-0/1, step-<stage_key>, correct-btn, save-correction-btn, cancel-correction-btn, goto-current-btn, processo-title. Login testids: login-email-input/login-password-input/login-submit-btn. JWT in localStorage.smera_token.
rca_of_the_issue: PRIMARY BUG (signed-doc upload not working) — RCA: previously onUploadSigned set headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' } explicitly on axios, which stripped the boundary that the browser must generate for multipart bodies, so the backend could not parse the multipart form → 400/415. Fix applied in RLMProcessoDetail.jsx: pass FormData directly to api.post without any Content-Type header, letting axios/browser set 'multipart/form-data; boundary=...'. VERIFIED: after fix, POST /rlm-processes/{id}/upload-signed returned 200 with a stored path (smera/rlm/<id>/<uuid>.pdf), UI showed signed-file-link + signed-stamp, PUT then persisted the file record. No console errors, no error toast.
